title: Exodus
description: Taking the features and mechanics of vanilla minecraft to new heights!
body:
# **AN ADVENTURE AWAITS!**

Take your minecraft journy to new heights in **EXODUS**! 

Experience new and improved biomes, 
And you better get a elytra ready when going to new heights such as the **AETHER** and the new nether biomes thanks to mods such as **BIOMES O' PLENTY**! More to come in the future with plenty of updates!

**This description will be updated over time with updates and more infomation as i build the pack with feedback and new mods too add to the experience!**
